name: Nurix Therapeutics, Inc.
summary: PART I When used in this report, unless otherwise indicated, Nurix, Company, we, us and our refers to Nurix Therapeutics, Inc. and its wholly owned subsidiaries. Overview We are a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the discovery, development and commercialization of targeted protein degradation medicines, the next frontier in innovative drug design aimed at improving treatment options for patients with cancer and inflammatory diseases.
